option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
# Tasks: Chapters & Lessons System
**Feature**: `001-chapters-lessons-system` **Generated**: 2026-04-15 **Source**: [plan.md](./plan.md) ôñ [spec.md](./spec.md) ôñ [data-model.md](./data-model.md) ôñ [contracts/server-actions.md](./contracts/server-actions.md) ôñ [research.md](./research.md) ôñ [quickstart.md](./quickstart.md)
---
## Phase 1 ã Setup
_Goal: Project initialization ã Prisma schema, Zod validation schemas, database migration._
- [X] T001 Add `Chapter` and `Lesson` models to `prisma/schema.prisma` with cascade relations, unique position indexes, and `chapters Chapter[]` relation on the existing `Course` model per data-model.md - [X] T002 Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add-chapters-lessons` to generate and apply the database migration - [X] T003 Add 6 Zod validation schemas (`createChapterSchema`, `updateChapterSchema`, `reorderChaptersSchema`, `createLessonSchema`, `updateLessonSchema`, `reorderLessonsSchema`) and their inferred types to `lib/zodSchema.ts` per data-model.md ôÏ Validation Rules
---
## Phase 2 ã Foundational
_Goal: Data-fetching functions and shared infrastructure that all user stories depend on. Must complete before user story phases._
- [X] T004 Modify `app/data/admin/admin-get-course.ts` to include `chapters` with nested `lessons` ordered by position in the Prisma query, and update the exported `AdminCourseDetailType` - [X] T005 [P] Create `app/data/admin/admin-get-chapters.ts` ã fetch all chapters for a course with lesson counts and lesson summaries (id, title, position, isFreePreview, videoFileKey) per contracts/server-actions.md ôÏ `adminGetChapters` - [X] T006 [P] Create `app/data/admin/admin-get-lesson.ts` ã fetch a single lesson with parent chapter context (id, title, courseId) per contracts/server-actions.md ôÏ `adminGetLesson`
---
## Phase 3 ã User Story 1: Admin Creates Chapters for a Course (P1)
_Goal: Full chapter CRUD with drag-and-drop reordering inside the course detail page._ _Independent Test: Create a course ã add 3 chapters ã reorder via drag-and-drop ã reload ã verify persisted order._
### Server Actions
- [X] T007 Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` with `"use server"` directive, Arcjet rate-limiting instance, and S3 cleanup helper per existing `actions.ts` pattern - [X] T008 Implement `createChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`createChapterSchema`) ã compute position ã `prisma.chapter.create` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T009 Implement `updateChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`updateChapterSchema`) ã `prisma.chapter.update` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T010 Implement `deleteChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã validate UUID ã fetch lessons with videoFileKey ã `Promise.allSettled` S3 deletes ã `prisma.chapter.delete` (cascade) ã re-calculate remaining positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T011 Implement `reorderChapters` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`reorderChaptersSchema`) ã verify count match ã `prisma.$transaction` with temporary negative positions then final positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse`
### UI Components
- [X] T012 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CreateChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with Dialog, React Hook Form + `createChapterSchema`, calls `createChapter` action, shows Sonner toast on success/error - [X] T013 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/EditChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with Dialog, React Hook Form + `updateChapterSchema`, pre-filled title, calls `updateChapter` action, shows Sonner toast - [X] T014 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/DeleteChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with AlertDialog, warns about cascade lesson deletion, calls `deleteChapter` action, shows Sonner toast - [X] T015 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/ChapterItem.tsx` ã client component rendering a single chapter row with drag handle (`useSortable`), title, lesson count badge, edit button (opens EditChapterDialog), delete button (opens DeleteChapterDialog) - [X] T016 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/ChapterList.tsx` ã client component with `DndContext` + `SortableContext` (`verticalListSortingStrategy`), PointerSensor + KeyboardSensor, `restrictToVerticalAxis` modifier, renders `ChapterItem` for each chapter, calls `reorderChapters` on drag end with optimistic UI - [X] T017 [US1] Modify `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CourseDetailView.tsx` to add a "Chapters" section below existing content that renders `ChapterList` and a "Add Chapter" button triggering `CreateChapterDialog`
---
## Phase 4 ã User Story 2: Admin Creates and Edits Lessons Within a Chapter (P1)
_Goal: Full lesson CRUD with drag-and-drop reordering, rich-text editing via Tiptap, and free-preview toggle._ _Independent Test: Create a chapter ã add 2 lessons with text content ã reorder ã toggle free preview on one ã reload ã verify all persisted._
### Server Actions
- [X] T018 Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` with `"use server"` directive, Arcjet rate-limiting instance, and S3 cleanup helper - [X] T019 Implement `createLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`createLessonSchema`) ã verify chapter exists ã compute position ã `prisma.lesson.create` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T020 Implement `updateLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`updateLessonSchema`) ã fetch existing lesson ã compare videoFileKey ã S3 cleanup old if changed ã `prisma.lesson.update` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T021 Implement `deleteLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã validate UUID ã fetch lesson with videoFileKey ã S3 delete if exists ã `prisma.lesson.delete` ã re-calculate remaining positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T022 Implement `reorderLessons` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`reorderLessonsSchema`) ã verify count match ã `prisma.$transaction` with temporary negative positions then final positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse`
### UI Components ã Lesson List (inside chapter)
- [ ] T023 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/LessonItem.tsx` ã client component rendering a single lesson row with drag handle (`useSortable`), title, free-preview badge, video-attached icon, and a link to lesson editor page (`/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]`) - [ ] T024 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/LessonList.tsx` ã client component with `DndContext` + `SortableContext`, renders `LessonItem` per lesson within a chapter, calls `reorderLessons` on drag end with optimistic UI, includes "Add Lesson" button - [ ] T025 [US2] Wire `LessonList` into `ChapterItem.tsx` ã expand/collapse lessons within each chapter item, pass chapter's lessons as props
### Lesson Editor Page
- [ ] T026 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/page.tsx` ã RSC page that calls `adminGetLesson(lessonId)`, renders breadcrumb (Course ã Chapter ã Lesson), and passes lesson data to `LessonEditorForm` - [ ] T027 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/_components/LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã client component with React Hook Form + `updateLessonSchema`, Tiptap rich-text editor for content, title input, free-preview toggle (Switch), save button calling `updateLesson` action, Sonner toasts for feedback
---
## Phase 5 ã User Story 3: Admin Uploads Video to a Lesson (P2)
_Goal: Video file upload/replace/remove on lessons using existing S3 infrastructure._ _Independent Test: Create a lesson ã upload a video ã verify file key stored ã replace with new video ã verify old deleted ã remove video ã verify key cleared._
- [ ] T028 [US3] Integrate the existing `Uploader` component into `LessonEditorForm.tsx` in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/_components/LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã configure with `accept` for video/mp4, video/webm, video/quicktime and `maxSize` of 500 MB, wire `onChange` to form field `videoFileKey` - [ ] T029 [US3] Add "Remove Video" button to `LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã when clicked, set `videoFileKey` to `null` in the form state; on save, the `updateLesson` action handles S3 cleanup of the old file - [ ] T030 [US3] Update the S3 upload API route (`app/api/s3/upload/`) to accept video content types (`video/mp4`, `video/webm`, `video/quicktime`) alongside existing image types, with the 500 MB size limit for videos
---
## Phase 6 ã User Story 4: Admin Views Chapter and Lesson Structure at a Glance (P3)
_Goal: Collapsible course outline with chapter counts, free-preview indicators, and video-attached indicators._ _Independent Test: Create a course with 2 chapters (one with 3 lessons, one with 1 lesson), toggle free preview on one lesson, attach a video to another ã verify all indicators render correctly in the outline._
- [ ] T031 [US4] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CourseOutline.tsx` ã server component rendering a collapsible outline of all chapters with nested lessons, showing per-chapter lesson count badge, per-lesson free-preview icon, and per-lesson video-attached icon - [ ] T032 [US4] Integrate `CourseOutline` into the course detail page (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/page.tsx` or `CourseDetailView.tsx`) ã render above or alongside the chapter management section as a read-only overview card
---
## Phase 7 ã Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns
_Goal: Edge cases, cascade behavior, error handling, and build verification._
- [ ] T033 Update `deleteCourse` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/actions.ts` to query all chapters ã lessons with `videoFileKey` and `Promise.allSettled` S3 deletes before course deletion (cascade S3 cleanup per FR-011) - [ ] T034 Add loading states (Skeleton) to `ChapterList` and `LessonList` components for async operations (reorder, create, delete) - [ ] T035 Add error boundary handling for the lesson editor route segment (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/error.tsx`) - [ ] T036 Add loading state for the lesson editor page (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/loading.tsx`) - [ ] T037 Verify `pnpm build` completes with zero errors and zero TypeScript warnings - [ ] T038 Perform manual end-to-end walkthrough per quickstart.md ôÏ Verify: chapter CRUD ã lesson CRUD ã video upload/replace/remove ã cascade delete ã admin auth enforcement
---
## Dependencies
``` Phase 1 (Setup) ããã Phase 2 (Foundational) ããã Phase 3 (US1: Chapters) ããã Phase 4 (US2: Lessons) ã ããã Phase 5 (US3: Video Upload) ããã Phase 6 (US4: Course Outline) ã depends on Phase 3 + Phase 4 data ããã Phase 7 (Polish) ```
**Key Ordering Constraints**: - T001ãT003 (Setup) must complete before anything else - T004ãT006 (Foundational) must complete before any UI or action work - Phase 3 (Chapters) before Phase 4 (Lessons) ã lessons render within chapters - Phase 4 (Lessons) before Phase 5 (Video) ã video is added to the lesson editor - Phase 6 (Outline) can start after Phase 3 + Phase 4 provide the data layer - Phase 7 (Polish) is last
---
## Parallel Execution Opportunities
**Within Phase 2**: - T005 and T006 can run in parallel (different files, no shared dependency)
**Within Phase 3**: - T012, T013, T014 can run in parallel (independent dialog components) - T007ãT011 (server actions) must complete before T016ãT017 (components that call them)
**Within Phase 4**: - T018ãT022 (lesson server actions) can be written in parallel with T023ãT024 (UI) if action signatures are known - T026 and T027 can run in parallel (page vs. form component)
**Within Phase 5**: - T028, T029, T030 can run in parallel (different files)
**Within Phase 7**: - T033, T034, T035, T036 can all run in parallel (different files)
---
## Implementation Strategy
1. **MVP Scope**: Phase 1 + Phase 2 + Phase 3 = a working chapters system with CRUD and reordering 2. **Incremental Delivery**: Each phase produces a testable increment: - After Phase 3: Chapters work end-to-end - After Phase 4: Lessons work end-to-end with rich text - After Phase 5: Video upload completes the lesson editor - After Phase 6: Course outline provides at-a-glance view - After Phase 7: Edge cases handled, build verified 3. **Risk Mitigation**: The hardest technical work (drag-and-drop + batch position updates) lands in Phase 3; if it takes longer, Phases 4ã6 are unblocked once the pattern is established
---
## Summary
| Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | **Total Tasks** | 38 | | **Phase 1 ã Setup** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 2 ã Foundational** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 3 ã US1: Chapters (P1)** | 11 tasks | | **Phase 4 ã US2: Lessons (P1)** | 10 tasks | | **Phase 5 ã US3: Video Upload (P2)** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 6 ã US4: Course Outline (P3)** | 2 tasks | | **Phase 7 ã Polish** | 6 tasks | | **Parallelizable Tasks** | 14 (marked [P] or noted above) | | **Suggested MVP** | Phases 1ã3 (17 tasks) |

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Tasks: Chapters & Lessons System
**Feature**: `001-chapters-lessons-system` **Generated**: 2026-04-15 **Source**: [plan.md](./plan.md) ôñ [spec.md](./spec.md) ôñ [data-model.md](./data-model.md) ôñ [contracts/server-actions.md](./contracts/server-actions.md) ôñ [research.md](./research.md) ôñ [quickstart.md](./quickstart.md)
---
## Phase 1 ã Setup
_Goal: Project initialization ã Prisma schema, Zod validation schemas, database migration._
- [X] T001 Add `Chapter` and `Lesson` models to `prisma/schema.prisma` with cascade relations, unique position indexes, and `chapters Chapter[]` relation on the existing `Course` model per data-model.md - [X] T002 Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add-chapters-lessons` to generate and apply the database migration - [X] T003 Add 6 Zod validation schemas (`createChapterSchema`, `updateChapterSchema`, `reorderChaptersSchema`, `createLessonSchema`, `updateLessonSchema`, `reorderLessonsSchema`) and their inferred types to `lib/zodSchema.ts` per data-model.md ôÏ Validation Rules
---
## Phase 2 ã Foundational
_Goal: Data-fetching functions and shared infrastructure that all user stories depend on. Must complete before user story phases._
- [X] T004 Modify `app/data/admin/admin-get-course.ts` to include `chapters` with nested `lessons` ordered by position in the Prisma query, and update the exported `AdminCourseDetailType` - [X] T005 [P] Create `app/data/admin/admin-get-chapters.ts` ã fetch all chapters for a course with lesson counts and lesson summaries (id, title, position, isFreePreview, videoFileKey) per contracts/server-actions.md ôÏ `adminGetChapters` - [X] T006 [P] Create `app/data/admin/admin-get-lesson.ts` ã fetch a single lesson with parent chapter context (id, title, courseId) per contracts/server-actions.md ôÏ `adminGetLesson`
---
## Phase 3 ã User Story 1: Admin Creates Chapters for a Course (P1)
_Goal: Full chapter CRUD with drag-and-drop reordering inside the course detail page._ _Independent Test: Create a course ã add 3 chapters ã reorder via drag-and-drop ã reload ã verify persisted order._
### Server Actions
- [X] T007 Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` with `"use server"` directive, Arcjet rate-limiting instance, and S3 cleanup helper per existing `actions.ts` pattern - [X] T008 Implement `createChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`createChapterSchema`) ã compute position ã `prisma.chapter.create` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T009 Implement `updateChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`updateChapterSchema`) ã `prisma.chapter.update` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T010 Implement `deleteChapter` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã validate UUID ã fetch lessons with videoFileKey ã `Promise.allSettled` S3 deletes ã `prisma.chapter.delete` (cascade) ã re-calculate remaining positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T011 Implement `reorderChapters` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/chapter-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`reorderChaptersSchema`) ã verify count match ã `prisma.$transaction` with temporary negative positions then final positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse`
### UI Components
- [X] T012 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CreateChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with Dialog, React Hook Form + `createChapterSchema`, calls `createChapter` action, shows Sonner toast on success/error - [X] T013 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/EditChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with Dialog, React Hook Form + `updateChapterSchema`, pre-filled title, calls `updateChapter` action, shows Sonner toast - [X] T014 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/DeleteChapterDialog.tsx` ã client component with AlertDialog, warns about cascade lesson deletion, calls `deleteChapter` action, shows Sonner toast - [X] T015 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/ChapterItem.tsx` ã client component rendering a single chapter row with drag handle (`useSortable`), title, lesson count badge, edit button (opens EditChapterDialog), delete button (opens DeleteChapterDialog) - [X] T016 [US1] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/ChapterList.tsx` ã client component with `DndContext` + `SortableContext` (`verticalListSortingStrategy`), PointerSensor + KeyboardSensor, `restrictToVerticalAxis` modifier, renders `ChapterItem` for each chapter, calls `reorderChapters` on drag end with optimistic UI - [X] T017 [US1] Modify `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CourseDetailView.tsx` to add a "Chapters" section below existing content that renders `ChapterList` and a "Add Chapter" button triggering `CreateChapterDialog`
---
## Phase 4 ã User Story 2: Admin Creates and Edits Lessons Within a Chapter (P1)
_Goal: Full lesson CRUD with drag-and-drop reordering, rich-text editing via Tiptap, and free-preview toggle._ _Independent Test: Create a chapter ã add 2 lessons with text content ã reorder ã toggle free preview on one ã reload ã verify all persisted._
### Server Actions
- [X] T018 Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` with `"use server"` directive, Arcjet rate-limiting instance, and S3 cleanup helper - [X] T019 Implement `createLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`createLessonSchema`) ã verify chapter exists ã compute position ã `prisma.lesson.create` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T020 Implement `updateLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`updateLessonSchema`) ã fetch existing lesson ã compare videoFileKey ã S3 cleanup old if changed ã `prisma.lesson.update` ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T021 Implement `deleteLesson` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã validate UUID ã fetch lesson with videoFileKey ã S3 delete if exists ã `prisma.lesson.delete` ã re-calculate remaining positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse` - [X] T022 Implement `reorderLessons` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_actions/lesson-actions.ts` ã requireAdmin ã Arcjet ã Zod validate (`reorderLessonsSchema`) ã verify count match ã `prisma.$transaction` with temporary negative positions then final positions ã revalidatePath ã return `ApiResponse`
### UI Components ã Lesson List (inside chapter)
- [X] T023 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/LessonItem.tsx` ã client component rendering a single lesson row with drag handle (`useSortable`), title, free-preview badge, video-attached icon, and a link to lesson editor page (`/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]`) - [X] T024 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/LessonList.tsx` ã client component with `DndContext` + `SortableContext`, renders `LessonItem` per lesson within a chapter, calls `reorderLessons` on drag end with optimistic UI, includes "Add Lesson" button - [X] T025 [US2] Wire `LessonList` into `ChapterItem.tsx` ã expand/collapse lessons within each chapter item, pass chapter's lessons as props
### Lesson Editor Page
- [ ] T026 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/page.tsx` ã RSC page that calls `adminGetLesson(lessonId)`, renders breadcrumb (Course ã Chapter ã Lesson), and passes lesson data to `LessonEditorForm` - [ ] T027 [US2] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/_components/LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã client component with React Hook Form + `updateLessonSchema`, Tiptap rich-text editor for content, title input, free-preview toggle (Switch), save button calling `updateLesson` action, Sonner toasts for feedback
---
## Phase 5 ã User Story 3: Admin Uploads Video to a Lesson (P2)
_Goal: Video file upload/replace/remove on lessons using existing S3 infrastructure._ _Independent Test: Create a lesson ã upload a video ã verify file key stored ã replace with new video ã verify old deleted ã remove video ã verify key cleared._
- [ ] T028 [US3] Integrate the existing `Uploader` component into `LessonEditorForm.tsx` in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/_components/LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã configure with `accept` for video/mp4, video/webm, video/quicktime and `maxSize` of 500 MB, wire `onChange` to form field `videoFileKey` - [ ] T029 [US3] Add "Remove Video" button to `LessonEditorForm.tsx` ã when clicked, set `videoFileKey` to `null` in the form state; on save, the `updateLesson` action handles S3 cleanup of the old file - [ ] T030 [US3] Update the S3 upload API route (`app/api/s3/upload/`) to accept video content types (`video/mp4`, `video/webm`, `video/quicktime`) alongside existing image types, with the 500 MB size limit for videos
---
## Phase 6 ã User Story 4: Admin Views Chapter and Lesson Structure at a Glance (P3)
_Goal: Collapsible course outline with chapter counts, free-preview indicators, and video-attached indicators._ _Independent Test: Create a course with 2 chapters (one with 3 lessons, one with 1 lesson), toggle free preview on one lesson, attach a video to another ã verify all indicators render correctly in the outline._
- [ ] T031 [US4] Create `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/_components/CourseOutline.tsx` ã server component rendering a collapsible outline of all chapters with nested lessons, showing per-chapter lesson count badge, per-lesson free-preview icon, and per-lesson video-attached icon - [ ] T032 [US4] Integrate `CourseOutline` into the course detail page (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/page.tsx` or `CourseDetailView.tsx`) ã render above or alongside the chapter management section as a read-only overview card
---
## Phase 7 ã Polish & Cross-Cutting Concerns
_Goal: Edge cases, cascade behavior, error handling, and build verification._
- [ ] T033 Update `deleteCourse` action in `app/admin/courses/[courseId]/actions.ts` to query all chapters ã lessons with `videoFileKey` and `Promise.allSettled` S3 deletes before course deletion (cascade S3 cleanup per FR-011) - [ ] T034 Add loading states (Skeleton) to `ChapterList` and `LessonList` components for async operations (reorder, create, delete) - [ ] T035 Add error boundary handling for the lesson editor route segment (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/error.tsx`) - [ ] T036 Add loading state for the lesson editor page (`app/admin/courses/[courseId]/lessons/[lessonId]/loading.tsx`) - [ ] T037 Verify `pnpm build` completes with zero errors and zero TypeScript warnings - [ ] T038 Perform manual end-to-end walkthrough per quickstart.md ôÏ Verify: chapter CRUD ã lesson CRUD ã video upload/replace/remove ã cascade delete ã admin auth enforcement
---
## Dependencies
``` Phase 1 (Setup) ããã Phase 2 (Foundational) ããã Phase 3 (US1: Chapters) ããã Phase 4 (US2: Lessons) ã ããã Phase 5 (US3: Video Upload) ããã Phase 6 (US4: Course Outline) ã depends on Phase 3 + Phase 4 data ããã Phase 7 (Polish) ```
**Key Ordering Constraints**: - T001ãT003 (Setup) must complete before anything else - T004ãT006 (Foundational) must complete before any UI or action work - Phase 3 (Chapters) before Phase 4 (Lessons) ã lessons render within chapters - Phase 4 (Lessons) before Phase 5 (Video) ã video is added to the lesson editor - Phase 6 (Outline) can start after Phase 3 + Phase 4 provide the data layer - Phase 7 (Polish) is last
---
## Parallel Execution Opportunities
**Within Phase 2**: - T005 and T006 can run in parallel (different files, no shared dependency)
**Within Phase 3**: - T012, T013, T014 can run in parallel (independent dialog components) - T007ãT011 (server actions) must complete before T016ãT017 (components that call them)
**Within Phase 4**: - T018ãT022 (lesson server actions) can be written in parallel with T023ãT024 (UI) if action signatures are known - T026 and T027 can run in parallel (page vs. form component)
**Within Phase 5**: - T028, T029, T030 can run in parallel (different files)
**Within Phase 7**: - T033, T034, T035, T036 can all run in parallel (different files)
---
## Implementation Strategy
1. **MVP Scope**: Phase 1 + Phase 2 + Phase 3 = a working chapters system with CRUD and reordering 2. **Incremental Delivery**: Each phase produces a testable increment: - After Phase 3: Chapters work end-to-end - After Phase 4: Lessons work end-to-end with rich text - After Phase 5: Video upload completes the lesson editor - After Phase 6: Course outline provides at-a-glance view - After Phase 7: Edge cases handled, build verified 3. **Risk Mitigation**: The hardest technical work (drag-and-drop + batch position updates) lands in Phase 3; if it takes longer, Phases 4ã6 are unblocked once the pattern is established
---
## Summary
| Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | **Total Tasks** | 38 | | **Phase 1 ã Setup** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 2 ã Foundational** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 3 ã US1: Chapters (P1)** | 11 tasks | | **Phase 4 ã US2: Lessons (P1)** | 10 tasks | | **Phase 5 ã US3: Video Upload (P2)** | 3 tasks | | **Phase 6 ã US4: Course Outline (P3)** | 2 tasks | | **Phase 7 ã Polish** | 6 tasks | | **Parallelizable Tasks** | 14 (marked [P] or noted above) | | **Suggested MVP** | Phases 1ã3 (17 tasks) |
